title: Boardman Lake (Idaho)
summary: Boardman Lake is an alpine lake in Camas County, Idaho, United States, located in the Soldier Mountains in the Sawtooth National Forest.  While no trails lead to the lake, it can be most easily accessed from trail 091.  The lake is north of Boardman Peak.
